info.title: Kyvo REST API
info.description: Versioned REST API for tenants, applications, memberships, identity providers, and audit logs.

post.summary: Registers a new application (platform administrators only).

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

get.summary: Lists applications with pagination.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

post.summary: Creates an OAuth/OIDC client for the given application.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

post.summary: Provisions a tenant linked to an application (platform administrators only).

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

get.summary: Checks whether an application slug is available.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

get.summary: Returns a single application by identifier.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

get.summary: Returns login branding settings for an application.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

patch.summary: Updates login branding (colors and enable flag) for an application.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

post.summary: Uploads a logo for the application login screen.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

delete.summary: Removes the custom login logo for an application.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

get.summary: Lists audit log entries for the current tenant with optional filters.

403.description: Forbidden

get.summary: Lists distinct filter values for audit log queries.

403.description: Forbidden

post.summary: Creates a tenant for the current OAuth application session (SaaS onboarding).
post.description: Creates a tenant for the current OAuth application session (SaaS onboarding). Callers that need fresh `tid`/`trole` claims afterwards should redeem their existing refresh token against `/connect/token` (same pattern used after `switch-tenant`).

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

post.summary: Switches the active tenant for the current user session.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

get.summary: Lists active authentication sessions for the current user.

403.description: Authenticated but not allowed to perform this action.

delete.summary: Deletes the authenticated user's account for the current application tenant context.

403.description: Forbidden

CreatedIdResponse.description: Minimal response body when an endpoint creates a resource and returns its identifier.

SubscribeTenantResponse.description: Response for SaaS tenant subscription. Refresh tokens via /connect/token to pick up tid/trole claims.
